title: Abstract Generic Bin Grid
description: The shared properties for a non seismic bin grid. Either ABCD or other attributes need to used. Maybe not the two ways at the same time (problem if they are not the same)

ABCDBinGridSpatialLocation.description: Bin Grid ABCD points containing the projected coordinates, projected CRS and quality metadata where A = (i=0, j=0), B = (i=0, j=jMax), C = (i=Imax, j=0) and D = (i=Imax, j=Jmax)

OriginEasting.description: Easting coordinate of origin point (e.g., A point)

OriginNorthing.description: Northing coordinate of origin point (e.g., A point)

ScaleFactor.description: Scale factor for Bin Grid.  If not provided then 1 is assumed. Unit is unity.

BinWidthOnIaxis.description: Distance between two nodes on the I axis.  Unit from projected CRS in ABCDBinGridSpatialLocation

BinWidthOnJaxis.description: Distance between two nodes on the J axis.  Unit from projected CRS in ABCDBinGridSpatialLocation

MapGridBearingOfBinGridJaxis.description: Clockwise angle from grid north (in projCRS) in degrees from 0 to 360 to the direction of J axis

NodeCountOnIAxis.description: The count of nodes on I Axis

NodeCountOnJAxis.description: The count of nodes on J Axis

TransformationMethod.description: EPSG code: 9666 for right-handed, 1049 for left-handed.  See IOGP Guidance Note 373-07-2 and 483-6.
